concept: each data point is a glass tube that fills with the subject's own photo to its value, side by side
code:
for i in range(n):
    frac = clamp(values[i]/vmax) * reveal
    x = RX0 + 20 + i*300
    w = 220; h = 600; y = 500
    img = images.get(labels[i]) if labels[i] in images else None
    fill_image(img, frac, x, y, w, h, direction='up', color=ACCENT)
    d.rounded_rectangle([x,y,x+w,y+h], outline=rgba(TEXT,255), width=4)
    text(labels[i], x+w/2, y+h+16, size=34, center=True)
    text(str(int(values[i])), x+w/2, y-60, size=48, color=HIGHLIGHT, center=True)

concept: two subjects face off, each emitting expanding sound rings whose count and reach scale with its decibel value
code:
cy = 600
wimg = images.get(labels[0])
jimg = images.get(labels[1])
for i in range(2):
    v = values[i]
    cxs = RX0 + 240 if i == 0 else RX1 - 240
    col = HIGHLIGHT if i == 0 else ACCENT
    rings = int(clamp(v / vmax) * 6.0 * reveal) + 1
    for k in range(rings):
        rr = 60 + k * 52
        a = int(190.0 * (1.0 - k / (rings + 1.0)) * reveal)
        d.ellipse([cxs - rr, cy - rr, cxs + rr, cy + rr],
                  outline=rgba(col, a), width=6)
img = wimg
for i in range(2):
    img = wimg if i == 0 else jimg
    cxs = RX0 + 240 if i == 0 else RX1 - 240
    if img is not None:
        asp = img.width / img.height
        w = 330
        h = int(w / asp)
        if h > 300:
            h = 300
            w = int(h * asp)
        paste(img, cxs - w // 2, cy - h // 2, w, h)
    col = HIGHLIGHT if i == 0 else ACCENT
    na = clamp((reveal - 0.4) / 0.6)
    text(str(int(values[i])) + ' dB', cxs, cy - 330, size=70, color=col, center=True)
    text(labels[i], cxs, cy + 210, size=40, center=True)
mid = clamp((reveal - 0.7) / 0.3)
if mid > 0:
    text('1.5x LOUDER', (RX0 + RX1) // 2, 950, size=54, color=WARN, center=True)
topic: Loudest Animals — whale vs jet engine

concept: the single subject sits at the center of sound rings radiating to the frame edges, its value huge at the top
code:
cx = (RX0 + RX1) // 2
cy = 620
img = images.get(labels[0])
rings = int(9.0 * reveal) + 1
for k in range(rings):
    rr = 100 + k * 95
    a = int(170.0 * (1.0 - k / (rings + 2.0)))
    d.ellipse([cx - rr, cy - rr, cx + rr, cy + rr],
              outline=rgba(HIGHLIGHT, a), width=8)
if img is not None:
    asp = img.width / img.height
    w = 660
    h = int(w / asp)
    if h > 500:
        h = 500
        w = int(h * asp)
    paste(img, cx - w // 2, cy - h // 2, w, h)
na = clamp((reveal - 0.3) / 0.5)
text(str(int(values[0])) + ' dB', cx, RTOP + 40, size=120,
     color=HIGHLIGHT, center=True)
text('the loudest animal EVER', cx, cy + 300, size=46, center=True)
text(labels[0], cx, cy + 360, size=40, color=ACCENT, center=True)

concept: two pressure gauges sweep to each contender's PSI, their photos mounted under the dials
code:
for i in range(2):
    v = values[i]
    cxs = RX0 + 250 if i == 0 else RX1 - 250
    cy = 560
    r = 210
    col = HIGHLIGHT if i == 0 else ACCENT
    d.arc([cxs - r, cy - r, cxs + r, cy + r], 150, 390,
          fill=rgba(TEXT, 90), width=16)
    sweep = 150.0 + 240.0 * clamp(v / vmax) * reveal
    d.arc([cxs - r, cy - r, cxs + r, cy + r], 150, int(sweep),
          fill=rgba(col, 255), width=16)
    ang = sweep * math.pi / 180.0
    nx = cxs + int((r - 30) * math.cos(ang))
    ny = cy + int((r - 30) * math.sin(ang))
    d.line([cxs, cy, nx, ny], fill=rgba(col, 255), width=10)
    d.ellipse([cxs - 16, cy - 16, cxs + 16, cy + 16], fill=rgba(col, 255))
    if i == 0:
        img = subject_image('saltwater crocodile open jaws close up')
    else:
        img = subject_image('human man smiling portrait face')
    if img is not None:
        asp = img.width / img.height
        w = 310
        h = int(w / asp)
        if h > 220:
            h = 220
            w = int(h * asp)
        paste(img, cxs - w // 2, cy + r + 10, w, h)
    text(str(int(v)) + ' PSI', cxs, cy - r - 100, size=62, color=col, center=True)
    text(labels[i], cxs, cy + r + 240, size=38, center=True)
mid = clamp((reveal - 0.7) / 0.3)
if mid > 0:
    text('23x STRONGER', (RX0 + RX1) // 2, RBOT - 80, size=56,
         color=WARN, center=True)
topic: two contenders on sweeping pressure dials

concept: a stylized world map with migration paths tracing the routes of each bird species, their images and values displayed at the terminus of each path
code:
for i in range(n):
    v = values[i]
    label = labels[i]
    img = subject_image(label)
    cx = RX0 + 200 + i * 260
    cy = RBOT - 200
    if img is not None:
        asp = img.width / img.height
        w = 140
        h = int(w / asp)
        paste(img, cx - w // 2, cy - h, w, h)
    path_x = [cx, cx, RX0 + 100, RX1 - 100, cx]
    path_y = [cy, RTOP + 100, RTOP + 100, RTOP + 100, cy]
    for j in range(len(path_x) - 1):
        dx = path_x[j + 1] - path_x[j]
        dy = path_y[j + 1] - path_y[j]
        dist = math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy)
        dx /= dist
        dy /= dist
        steps = int(dist * reveal * 10)
        for k in range(steps):
            x = path_x[j] + k * dx * dist / steps
            y = path_y[j] + k * dy * dist / steps
            d.ellipse([x - 2, y - 2, x + 2, y + 2], fill=rgba(ACCENT, 255))
    text(str(int(v)) + ' miles', cx, cy + 20, size=36, color=TEXT, center=True)
    text(label, cx, cy - 40, size=32, center=True)

concept: a cargo crane lifts shipping containers filled to each ship's cargo capacity, with the ship's photo and label displayed alongside
code:
for i in range(n):
    v = values[i]
    cxs = RX0 + 250 if i == 0 else RX1 - 250
    cy = RTOP + 200
    r = 80
    col = HIGHLIGHT if i == 0 else ACCENT
    d.ellipse([cxs - r, cy - r, cxs + r, cy + r], fill=rgba(TEXT, 90))
    fill_image(subject_image('shipping container'), clamp(v / vmax) * reveal, cxs - r, cy - r, r * 2, r * 2)
    img = subject_image(labels[i])
    if img is not None:
        asp = img.width / img.height
        w = 200
        h = int(w / asp)
        paste(img, cxs - w // 2, cy + r + 20, w, h)
    text(str(int(v)) + ' TEU', cxs, cy + r + 150, size=46, color=col, center=True)
    text(labels[i], cxs, cy + r + 220, size=38, center=True)
    crane_y = lerp(cy + r + 20, cy + r + 150, reveal)
    d.line([cxs, crane_y, cxs, cy + r + 150], fill=rgba(col, 255), width=8)

concept: two ancient scrolls with images of food unroll to reveal the year and recipe name, the length of the unrolled portion representing the time period
code:
for i in range(n):
    v = values[i]
    cxs = RX0 + 250 if i == 0 else RX1 - 250
    cy = RTOP + 200
    img = subject_image('ancient scroll')
    if img is not None:
        asp = img.width / img.height
        w = 200
        h = int(w / asp)
        paste(img, cxs - w // 2, cy - h // 2, w, h)
    scroll_w = 20
    scroll_h = 600 * clamp(v / vmax) * reveal
    d.rectangle([cxs - scroll_w // 2, cy + h // 2, cxs + scroll_w // 2, cy + h // 2 + scroll_h], fill=rgba(ACCENT, 200))
    text(labels[i], cxs, cy + h // 2 + scroll_h + 20, size=38, color=TEXT, center=True)
    text(str(int(v)) + ' years ago', cxs, cy + h // 2 + scroll_h + 60, size=38, color=TEXT, center=True)
    recipe_img = subject_image('recipe book page')
    if recipe_img is not None:
        asp = recipe_img.width / recipe_img.height
        rw = 150
        rh = int(rw / asp)
        paste(recipe_img, cxs - rw // 2, cy + h // 2 + scroll_h + 100, rw, rh)

concept: a set of shelves where each data point is represented by a jar filled with its corresponding ingredient, with the jar size and filling level indicating its value
code:
cx = (RX0 + RX1) // 2
cy = RTOP + 200
n = len(values)
shelf_h = 120
shelf_gap = 40
for i in range(n):
    v = values[i]
    label = labels[i]
    img = subject_image(label)
    if img is not None:
        asp = img.width / img.height
        w = 80
        h = int(w / asp)
        if h > 100:
            h = 100
            w = int(h * asp)
        shelf_y = cy + i * (shelf_h + shelf_gap)
        jar_w = 100
        jar_h = 150
        fill_h = int(jar_h * clamp(v / vmax) * reveal)
        d.rectangle([cx - jar_w // 2, shelf_y, cx + jar_w // 2, shelf_y + shelf_h], fill=rgba(ACCENT, 10))
        d.rectangle([cx - jar_w // 2, shelf_y + shelf_h - fill_h, cx + jar_w // 2, shelf_y + shelf_h], fill=rgba(HIGHLIGHT, 255))
        paste(img, cx - w // 2, shelf_y + shelf_h + 10, w, h)
        text(str(int(v)), cx, shelf_y + shelf_h + 120, size=36, color=TEXT, center=True)
        text(label, cx, shelf_y - 30, size=30, color=TEXT, center=True)

concept: three real coins squeeze through narrowing goalpost gates sized to each odds value -- the gap (and the coin) shrinks from a wide 50% gate to a sliver at 1%
code:
gap_max = 260.0
gap_min = 26.0
cols = max(n, 1)
col_w = (RX1 - RX0) / cols
top = RTOP + 150
bot = RBOT - 170
coin = subject_image("gold coin")
d.line([(RX0, top - 40), (RX1, top - 40)], fill=rgba(TEXT, 60), width=2)
for i in range(n):
    stage = clamp(reveal * n - i, 0.0, 1.0)
    if stage <= 0.0:
        continue
    cx = RX0 + col_w * (i + 0.5)
    frac = clamp(values[i] / vmax, 0.0, 1.0)
    gap = lerp(gap_min, gap_max, frac) * stage
    post_top = top
    post_bot = lerp(top, bot, stage)
    d.rounded_rectangle([cx - gap / 2 - 14, post_top, cx - gap / 2, post_bot],
                         radius=8, fill=rgba(ACCENT, 220))
    d.rounded_rectangle([cx + gap / 2, post_top, cx + gap / 2 + 14, post_bot],
                         radius=8, fill=rgba(ACCENT, 220))
    mid_y = lerp(post_top, post_bot, 0.42)
    size = clamp(gap - 16, 30, 170) * stage
    if coin is not None:
        paste(coin, cx - size / 2, mid_y - size / 2, size, size)
    else:
        d.ellipse([cx - size / 2, mid_y - size / 2, cx + size / 2, mid_y + size / 2],
                   fill=rgba(HIGHLIGHT, 230))
    text(f"{values[i]:.0f}%", cx, post_bot + 14, size=46, color=HIGHLIGHT, center=True)
    text(labels[i].upper(), cx, post_bot + 66, size=24, color=TEXT, center=True)

concept: real dice photos stack into three towers, tower height = probability -- a tall stack for the common sum-7, two short matching stacks for the rare 2 and 12
code:
cols = max(n, 1)
col_w = (RX1 - RX0) / cols
base_y = RBOT - 70
die_size = 96
die = subject_image("red dice")
for i in range(n):
    cx = RX0 + col_w * (i + 0.5)
    count = max(1, int(round(values[i] / 2)))
    stage = clamp(reveal * n - i, 0.0, 1.0)
    shown = int(round(count * stage))
    for k in range(shown):
        wob = 10 * math.sin(k * 1.4 + reveal * 3)
        y = base_y - k * (die_size * 0.82)
        x = cx - die_size / 2 + wob
        if die is not None:
            paste(die, x, y - die_size, die_size, die_size)
        else:
            d.rounded_rectangle([x, y - die_size, x + die_size, y], radius=14,
                                 fill=rgba(ACCENT, 220))
    d.rounded_rectangle([cx - col_w * 0.42, base_y, cx + col_w * 0.42, base_y + 10],
                         radius=4, fill=rgba(TEXT, 60))
    text(f"{values[i]:.0f}%", cx, base_y + 26, size=46, color=HIGHLIGHT, center=True)
    text(labels[i].upper(), cx, base_y + 80, size=24, color=TEXT, center=True)

concept: a fanned arc of real card-back photos shrinks by one card per draw, the glowing target card highlighted in the fan, odds ticking up as the deck thins
code:
cx = (RX0 + RX1) / 2
row_h = (RBOT - RTOP - 220) / max(n, 1)
card = subject_image("playing card back")
for i in range(n):
    cy = RTOP + 220 + row_h * i
    stage = clamp(reveal * n - i, 0.0, 1.0)
    if stage <= 0.0:
        continue
    count = max(6, 14 - i)
    shown = max(1, int(round(count * stage)))
    radius = 250.0
    spread = math.radians(150)
    start = -spread / 2
    card_w, card_h = 58, 84
    target_k = shown // 2
    for k in range(shown):
        ang = start + spread * (k / max(1, count - 1))
        x = cx + radius * math.sin(ang)
        y = cy - radius * math.cos(ang) * 0.5
        is_target = (k == target_k)
        w = card_w * (1.35 if is_target else 1.0)
        h = card_h * (1.35 if is_target else 1.0)
        if is_target:
            d.ellipse([x - w, y - h, x + w, y + h], fill=rgba(HIGHLIGHT, 90))
        if card is not None:
            paste(card, x - w / 2, y - h / 2, w, h)
        else:
            d.rounded_rectangle([x - w / 2, y - h / 2, x + w / 2, y + h / 2], radius=8,
                                 fill=rgba(HIGHLIGHT if is_target else ACCENT, 230))
    text(f"{values[i]:.1f}%", cx, cy + row_h * 0.36, size=46, color=HIGHLIGHT, center=True)
    text(f"{labels[i].upper()} · {count} LEFT", cx, cy + row_h * 0.36 + 54, size=24,
         color=TEXT, center=True)

concept: a rising line connects three years, a real seedling photo growing at the line's tip as the probability-and-stats application index climbs
code:
pts_x = [RX0 + 120 + i * (RX1 - RX0 - 240) / max(n - 1, 1) for i in range(n)]
vmin = min(values) if values else 0.0
vspan = max(vmax - vmin, 1e-6)
pts_y = [lerp(RBOT - 200, RTOP + 240, (v - vmin) / vspan) for v in values]
stage_total = clamp(reveal * (n + 1), 0.0, float(n + 1))
d.line([(RX0, RBOT - 200), (RX1, RBOT - 200)], fill=rgba(TEXT, 55), width=2)
icon = subject_image("growing plant seedling")
for i in range(n - 1):
    seg_stage = clamp(stage_total - i, 0.0, 1.0)
    if seg_stage <= 0.0:
        continue
    x0, y0 = pts_x[i], pts_y[i]
    x1 = lerp(x0, pts_x[i + 1], seg_stage)
    y1 = lerp(y0, pts_y[i + 1], seg_stage)
    d.line([(x0, y0), (x1, y1)], fill=rgba(ACCENT, 230), width=10)
for i in range(n):
    node_stage = clamp(stage_total - i, 0.0, 1.0)
    if node_stage <= 0.0:
        continue
    x, y = pts_x[i], pts_y[i]
    r = 10 + 8 * node_stage
    d.ellipse([x - r, y - r, x + r, y + r], fill=rgba(HIGHLIGHT, 240))
    text(f"{values[i]:.1f}%", x, y - 56, size=34, color=TEXT, center=True)
    text(labels[i], x, y + 20, size=24, color=TEXT, center=True)
tip_stage = clamp(stage_total - (n - 1), 0.0, 1.0)
if tip_stage > 0.0 and icon is not None:
    size = 90 + 46 * tip_stage
    paste(icon, pts_x[-1] - size / 2, pts_y[-1] - size - 24, size, size)

concept: three urgency dials sweep to their own value -- an hourglass for the 14-day death clock, a warning flag for the 43% endangered, a megaphone for the top-5 languages dominating half of humanity
code:
icon_names = ["hourglass", "warning flag", "megaphone"]
cols = max(n, 1)
col_w = (RX1 - RX0) / cols
cy = RTOP + 330
radius = 150.0
for i in range(n):
    cx = RX0 + col_w * (i + 0.5)
    stage = clamp(reveal * n - i, 0.0, 1.0)
    if stage <= 0.0:
        continue
    frac = clamp(values[i] / vmax, 0.0, 1.0) * stage
    start_ang, end_ang = -210.0, 30.0
    sweep = start_ang + (end_ang - start_ang) * frac
    d.arc([cx - radius, cy - radius, cx + radius, cy + radius], start_ang, end_ang,
          fill=rgba(TEXT, 50), width=18)
    d.arc([cx - radius, cy - radius, cx + radius, cy + radius], start_ang, sweep,
          fill=rgba(WARN if values[i] >= vmax * 0.6 else HIGHLIGHT, 240), width=18)
    icon = subject_image(icon_names[i % len(icon_names)])
    isize = 128 * stage
    if icon is not None:
        paste(icon, cx - isize / 2, cy - isize / 2, isize, isize)
    else:
        d.ellipse([cx - isize / 2, cy - isize / 2, cx + isize / 2, cy + isize / 2],
                   fill=rgba(ACCENT, 200))
    text(f"{values[i]:.0f}", cx, cy + radius + 26, size=50, color=TEXT, center=True)
    text(labels[i].upper(), cx, cy + radius + 84, size=22, color=TEXT, center=True)

concept: a real Earth photo is lit at the bottom only 10% up, the rest washed dark with fading dots -- pulsing signal rings mark the sliver of languages with an online voice
code:
cx = (RX0 + RX1) / 2
gw, gh = 520.0, 520.0
gx, gy = cx - gw / 2, RTOP + 150
globe = subject_image("planet earth from space")
frac_lit = clamp(values[0] / 100.0, 0.0, 1.0) * clamp(reveal * 1.6, 0.0, 1.0)
if globe is not None:
    paste(globe, gx, gy, gw, gh)
else:
    d.ellipse([gx, gy, gx + gw, gy + gh], fill=rgba(ACCENT, 200))
dark_h = gh * (1.0 - frac_lit)
d.rectangle([gx, gy, gx + gw, gy + dark_h], fill=rgba((8, 10, 18), 175))
for k in range(9):
    kx = gx + gw * (0.12 + 0.11 * k)
    ky = gy + dark_h * (0.2 + 0.6 * ((k * 37) % 10) / 10.0)
    dstage = clamp(reveal * 9 - k, 0.0, 1.0)
    r = 5 * dstage
    if dstage > 0.0 and ky < gy + dark_h - 6:
        d.ellipse([kx - r, ky - r, kx + r, ky + r], fill=rgba(TEXT, 130))
ring_cy = gy + gh - 6
for ring in range(3):
    rp = clamp(reveal - ring * 0.15, 0.0, 1.0)
    if rp <= 0.0:
        continue
    rr = 20 + rp * 140
    alpha = int(160 * (1 - rp))
    d.ellipse([cx - rr, ring_cy - rr * 0.35, cx + rr, ring_cy + rr * 0.35],
              outline=rgba(HIGHLIGHT, alpha), width=6)
text(f"{values[0]:.0f}%", cx, gy + gh - 90, size=54, color=HIGHLIGHT, center=True)
text(labels[0].upper(), cx, gy + gh - 40, size=24, color=TEXT, center=True)
text(f"{values[1]:.0f}%", cx, gy + 40, size=46, color=WARN, center=True)
text(labels[1].upper(), cx, gy + 88, size=22, color=TEXT, center=True)

concept: a revival dial sweeps to the 20% of languages pulled back from the brink, a real seedling glowing at its center, while real leaf photos sprout one by one showing the 15%-a-year rise in learners
code:
cx1 = RX0 + (RX1 - RX0) * 0.28
cy = RTOP + 330
radius = 160.0
frac = clamp(values[0] / 100.0, 0.0, 1.0) * clamp(reveal * 1.4, 0.0, 1.0)
start_ang, end_ang = -220.0, 40.0
sweep = start_ang + (end_ang - start_ang) * frac
d.arc([cx1 - radius, cy - radius, cx1 + radius, cy + radius], start_ang, end_ang,
      fill=rgba(TEXT, 50), width=20)
d.arc([cx1 - radius, cy - radius, cx1 + radius, cy + radius], start_ang, sweep,
      fill=rgba(HIGHLIGHT, 240), width=20)
plant = subject_image("seedling sprout in soil")
psize = 190.0
if plant is not None:
    paste(plant, cx1 - psize / 2, cy - psize / 2, psize, psize)
text(f"{values[0]:.0f}%", cx1, cy + radius + 26, size=48, color=TEXT, center=True)
text(labels[0].upper(), cx1, cy + radius + 80, size=22, color=TEXT, center=True)

cx2 = RX0 + (RX1 - RX0) * 0.74
leaf_count = max(1, int(round(values[1] / 3)))
leaf = subject_image("green leaf")
top_y = RTOP + 220
for k in range(leaf_count):
    lstage = clamp(reveal * leaf_count - k, 0.0, 1.0)
    if lstage <= 0.0:
        continue
    ly = top_y + k * 60
    lx = cx2 + 46 * math.sin(k * 1.7)
    lsize = 68 * lstage
    if leaf is not None:
        paste(leaf, lx - lsize / 2, ly - lsize / 2, lsize, lsize)
    else:
        d.ellipse([lx - lsize / 2, ly - lsize / 2, lx + lsize / 2, ly + lsize / 2],
                   fill=rgba(HIGHLIGHT, 220))
text(f"+{values[1]:.0f}%/YR", cx2, top_y + leaf_count * 60 + 36, size=40,
     color=HIGHLIGHT, center=True)
text(labels[1].upper(), cx2, top_y + leaf_count * 60 + 84, size=22, color=TEXT, center=True)

concept: Each lake's salinity creates ripples in the form of circular waves, with the subject image at the center and its label and value displayed on the waves
code:
cx = (RX0 + RX1) // 2
cy = (RTOP + RBOT) // 2
n = len(values)
for i in range(n):
    v = values[i]
    label = labels[i]
    angle = 2 * math.pi * i / n
    radius = 200 + 100 * clamp(v / vmax)
    img = subject_image(label.lower().replace(' ', '-') + '-lake-panorama')
    if img is not None:
        asp = img.width / img.height
        w = 400
        h = int(w / asp)
        if h > 300:
            h = 300
            w = int(h * asp)
        paste(img, cx - w // 2, cy - h // 2, w, h)
    d.line([cx, cy, cx + int(radius * math.cos(angle)), cy + int(radius * math.sin(angle))], fill=rgba(ACCENT, 128), width=4)
    text(str(int(v)) + ' percent', cx + int(radius * 1.1 * math.cos(angle)), cy + int(radius * 1.1 * math.sin(angle)), size=36, color=ACCENT, center=True)
    text(label, cx + int((radius + 50) * math.cos(angle)), cy + int((radius + 50) * math.sin(angle)), size=30, color=TEXT, center=True)
    for j in range(5):
        rr = radius + j * 20
        a = int(128 * (1 - j / 5.0))
        d.ellipse([cx - rr, cy - rr, cx + rr, cy + rr], outline=rgba(HIGHLIGHT, a), width=2)

concept: a seesaw with saltwater fish and salt tolerant plants on either side, their respective values determining the balance point
code:
for i in range(n):
    v = values[i]
    label = labels[i]
    if i == 0:
        cx = RX0 + 300
        col = ACCENT
        img = subject_image('saltwater fish')
    else:
        cx = RX1 - 300
        col = HIGHLIGHT
        img = subject_image('salt tolerant plants')
    cy = RTOP + 500
    r = 120
    d.ellipse([cx - r, cy - r, cx + r, cy + r], outline=rgba(TEXT, 120), width=8)
    if img is not None:
        asp = img.width / img.height
        w = 220
        h = int(w / asp)
        if h > 180:
            h = 180
            w = int(h * asp)
        paste(img, cx - w // 2, cy - h // 2, w, h)
    text(label, cx, cy + r + 20, size=36, color=col, center=True)
    text(str(int(v)), cx, cy - r - 60, size=48, color=col, center=True)
balance = lerp(RX0 + 300, RX1 - 300, clamp((values[0] / (values[0] + values[1])) * reveal))
d.line([balance, RTOP + 400, balance, RBOT - 100], fill=rgba(TEXT, 180), width=6)
d.ellipse([balance - 20, RTOP + 380, balance + 20, RTOP + 420], fill=rgba(TEXT, 180))

concept: Three transparent saltwater-filled columns rise to show relative salinity levels, with real images of each subject at the base
code:

        asp = img.width / img.height
        w = 200

    text(labels[i], cxs, cy + 240, size=40, center=True)

concept: stalactites and stalagmites grow from the cave ceiling and floor, their lengths representing humidity and temperature values
code:
cx = (RX0 + RX1) // 2
cy = (RTOP + RBOT) // 2
humidity_img = subject_image('water droplet')
temperature_img = subject_image('flame')
d.rectangle([RX0, RTOP, RX1, RBOT], fill=rgba((0, 0, 0), 255))
for i, (label, value) in enumerate(zip(labels, values)):
    if label == 'Humidity':
        stalactite_len = int(300 * clamp(value / vmax) * reveal)
        d.line([cx, RTOP, cx, RTOP + stalactite_len], fill=rgba(ACCENT, 255), width=10)
        if humidity_img is not None:
            asp = humidity_img.width / humidity_img.height
            w = 40
            h = int(w / asp)
            paste(humidity_img, cx - w // 2, RTOP + stalactite_len, w, h)
        text(str(int(value)) + ' %', cx, RTOP + stalactite_len + 20, size=32, color=ACCENT, center=True)
        text(label, cx, RTOP + stalactite_len + 60, size=28, center=True)
    elif label == 'Temperature':
        stalagmite_len = int(300 * clamp(value / vmax) * reveal)
        d.line([cx, RBOT, cx, RBOT - stalagmite_len], fill=rgba(HIGHLIGHT, 255), width=10)
        if temperature_img is not None:
            asp = temperature_img.width / temperature_img.height
            w = 40
            h = int(w / asp)
            paste(temperature_img, cx - w // 2, RBOT - stalagmite_len, w, h)
        text(str(int(value)) + ' °C', cx, RBOT - stalagmite_len - 20, size=32, color=HIGHLIGHT, center=True)
        text(label, cx, RBOT - stalagmite_len - 60, size=28, center=True)

concept: two formation anchors rise from the bottom, their ropes filling with subject images as the reveal progresses, each with its label and value
code:
for i in range(n):

concept: growing stalactites hang from the top, each with a label and value, as they form over time

concept: Two trees with trunks that grow and leaves that fill according to Forest Oxygen Production and City Oxygen Production, with their labels and values displayed
code:
for i in range(2):

    leaf_radius = 150
    col = HIGHLIGHT if i == 0 else ACCENT

concept: a stylized flower blooms in sync with the data, each petal representing a research paper, with the center filling to show the proportion of plant-based medicines
code:
for i in range(n):

    cx = RX0 + 200 if i == 0 else RX1 - 200

    r = 150

concept: Two toxin-filled vials rise from the bottom, their fill levels and labels indicating the potency and quantity of the toxins.

concept: A stylized speedometer with a sweeping needle and a subject image in the center, representing the speed of data transmission through different mediums
code:
for i in range(n):
    v = values[i]
    cxs = RX0 + 250 if i == 0 else RX1 - 250
    cy = 560
    r = 210
    col = HIGHLIGHT if i == 0 else ACCENT
    d.arc([cxs - r, cy - r, cxs + r, cy + r], 150, 390,
          fill=rgba(TEXT, 90), width=16)
    sweep = 150.0 + 240.0 * clamp(v / vmax) * reveal
    d.arc([cxs - r, cy - r, cxs + r, cy + r], 150, int(sweep),
          fill=rgba(col, 255), width=16)
    ang = sweep * math.pi / 180.0
    nx = cxs + int((r - 30) * math.cos(ang))
    ny = cy + int((r - 30) * math.sin(ang))
    d.line([cxs, cy, nx, ny], fill=rgba(col, 255), width=10)
    d.ellipse([cxs - 16, cy - 16, cxs + 16, cy + 16], fill=rgba(col, 255))
    img = subject_image(labels[i].lower().replace(' ', '_') + '_icon')
    if img is not None:
        asp = img.width / img.height
        w = 140
        h = int(w / asp)
        paste(img, cxs - w // 2, cy - h // 2, w, h)
    text(str(int(v)) + ' s', cxs, cy - r - 100, size=62, color=col, center=True)
    text(labels[i], cxs, cy + r + 240, size=38, center=True)

concept: A compass with sweeping needles and a rising gauge for each data point, filled with a subject image and labeled with its value and name
code:
for i in range(n):
    v = values[i]

    cy = 560
    r = 210
    col = HIGHLIGHT if i == 0 else ACCENT

    d.line([cxs, cy, cxs + int((r - 30) * math.cos(math.radians(sweep))), cy + int((r - 30) * math.sin(math.radians(sweep)))], fill=rgba(col, 255), width=10)
    d.ellipse([cxs - 16, cy - 16, cxs + 16, cy + 16], fill=rgba(col, 255))

    gauge_y = cy + r + 280

mid = clamp((reveal - 0.7) / 0.3)

concept: Two continents drift across a splitting globe; the distance each slides is scaled to its real speed in centimeters per year.
code:
cx, cy, r = (RX0 + RX1) // 2, RTOP + 260, 220
d.ellipse([cx - r, cy - r, cx + r, cy + r], fill=rgba("#123a5e", 230))
globe = subject_image("planet Earth")
if globe:
    fill_image(globe, 1.0, cx - r, cy - r, r * 2, r * 2, direction='up')
d.arc([cx - r - 14, cy - r - 14, cx + r + 14, cy + r + 14], 200, 340, fill=rgba(ACCENT, 220), width=10)
lane_y = cy + r + 60
lane_h = 200
maxv = vmax if vmax > 0 else 1.0
for i in range(min(n, 2)):
    ly = lane_y + i * (lane_h + 50)
    d.rounded_rectangle([RX0, ly, RX1, ly + lane_h], radius=26, fill=rgba("#16233a", 210))
    d.line([RX0 + 30, ly + lane_h - 26, RX1 - 30, ly + lane_h - 26], fill=rgba(HIGHLIGHT, 160), width=6)
    frac = values[i] / maxv
    travel = (RX1 - RX0 - 240) * frac * reveal
    chip = images.get(labels[i]) or subject_image("tectonic plate rock")
    sz = 160
    px, py = RX0 + 30 + travel, ly + (lane_h - sz) / 2 - 6
    paste(chip, px, py, sz, sz)
    text(labels[i], RX0 + 30, ly + 12, size=36)
    text(f"{values[i]:.0f} cm/yr", RX1 - 260, ly + lane_h - 66, size=52, color=HIGHLIGHT)

concept: The ground splits into a widening chasm; the gap between the two plate faces stretches open exactly as fast as each plate really moves.
code:
midx = (RX0 + RX1) // 2
maxv = vmax if vmax > 0 else 1.0
gap = 30 + 260 * reveal * (values[0] / maxv if n else 0)
groundtop = RTOP + 60
groundbot = RBOT - 90
lh = groundbot - groundtop
left_img = images.get(labels[0]) or subject_image("cracked rock ground")
right_img = (images.get(labels[1]) if n > 1 else None) or subject_image("cracked rock ground")
fill_image(left_img, 1.0, RX0, groundtop, midx - int(gap / 2) - RX0, lh, direction='right')
if n > 1:
    fill_image(right_img, 1.0, midx + int(gap / 2), groundtop, RX1 - (midx + int(gap / 2)), lh, direction='left')
glow = int(80 + 100 * reveal)
d.rectangle([midx - int(gap / 2), groundtop, midx + int(gap / 2), groundbot], fill=rgba(WARN, glow))
for k in range(6):
    yy = groundtop + k * (lh / 6)
    d.line([midx - int(gap / 2), yy, midx + int(gap / 2), yy], fill=rgba(HIGHLIGHT, 200), width=3)
text(labels[0], RX0 + 20, groundtop + 20, size=38)
text(f"{values[0]:.0f} cm/yr", RX0 + 20, groundtop + 70, size=54, color=HIGHLIGHT)
if n > 1:
    text(labels[1], RX1 - 320, groundtop + 20, size=38)
    text(f"{values[1]:.0f} cm/yr", RX1 - 320, groundtop + 70, size=54, color=HIGHLIGHT)
text("splitting wider every year", midx - 200, groundbot - 46, size=30, color=TEXT)

concept: A plate drifts left to right across a millions-of-years timeline, leaving a trail whose thickness is literally the speed at that era.
code:
axis_y = RBOT - 160
d.line([RX0 + 20, axis_y, RX1 - 20, axis_y], fill=rgba(TEXT, 160), width=4)
maxv = vmax if vmax > 0 else 1.0
plate_img = (images.get(labels[-1]) if n else None) or subject_image("tectonic plate continent")
step = (RX1 - RX0 - 300) / max(1, n - 1) if n > 1 else 0
for i in range(n):
    x = RX0 + 150 + step * i
    thick = 18 + 90 * (values[i] / maxv)
    if i > 0:
        prevx = RX0 + 150 + step * (i - 1)
        prevthick = 18 + 90 * (values[i - 1] / maxv)
        seg_reveal = clamp(reveal * n - i, 0, 1)
        cx = lerp(prevx, x, seg_reveal)
        d.line([prevx, axis_y, cx, axis_y], fill=rgba(ACCENT, 220), width=int(lerp(prevthick, thick, seg_reveal)))
    d.ellipse([x - 10, axis_y - 10, x + 10, axis_y + 10], fill=rgba(HIGHLIGHT, 255))
    text(labels[i], x - 90, axis_y + 24, size=28)
    text(f"{values[i]:.0f} cm/yr", x - 70, axis_y - 70, size=44, color=HIGHLIGHT)
sz = 210
paste(plate_img, RX0 + 150 + step * (n - 1) - sz / 2, axis_y - 250, sz, sz)

concept: Two rising gauges -- one erupting with a volcano, one cracking with a fault line -- fill to the exact share of global activity plate boundaries cause.
code:
maxv = 100.0
gw = 280
gx0 = RX0 + 40
gx1 = RX1 - gw - 40
gtop = RTOP + 60
gbot = RBOT - 110
gh = gbot - gtop
subs = ["volcano erupting", "earthquake crack"]
for i in range(min(n, 2)):
    gx = gx0 if i == 0 else gx1
    d.rounded_rectangle([gx, gtop, gx + gw, gbot], radius=30, outline=rgba(TEXT, 160), width=4)
    frac = clamp(values[i] / maxv, 0, 1) * reveal
    img = images.get(labels[i]) or subject_image(subs[i] if i < len(subs) else labels[i])
    fill_image(img, frac, gx + 8, gtop + 8, gw - 16, gh - 16, direction='up', color=WARN if i == 0 else ACCENT)
    text(labels[i], gx + 10, gtop - 46, size=32)
    text(f"{values[i]:.0f}%", gx + gw / 2, gtop + gh - 70, size=56, color=HIGHLIGHT, center=True)
text("caused at plate boundaries", RX0 + 20, RBOT - 56, size=28)

concept: Two real volcanoes each pour a lava river across the frame; the river's reach is literally how many cubic meters per second they erupt.
code:
maxv = vmax if vmax > 0 else 1.0
lane_h = 260
y0 = RTOP + 60
for i in range(min(n, 2)):
    ly = y0 + i * (lane_h + 60)
    volc = images.get(labels[i]) or subject_image("volcano erupting")
    paste(volc, RX0, ly, 210, lane_h)
    frac = values[i] / maxv
    river_len = (RX1 - RX0 - 250) * frac * reveal
    steps = 10
    for k in range(steps):
        seg_x = RX0 + 220 + river_len * k / steps
        seg_w = river_len / steps + 4
        wob = 10 * math.sin(reveal * 6 + k)
        d.rounded_rectangle([seg_x, ly + lane_h / 2 - 30 + wob, seg_x + seg_w, ly + lane_h / 2 + 30 + wob],
                             radius=16, fill=rgba(WARN, 220))
    text(labels[i], RX0 + 10, ly - 8, size=32)
    text(f"{values[i]:.0f} m3/s", RX0 + 220, ly + lane_h - 10, size=48, color=HIGHLIGHT)

concept: Two volcanic core shafts fill with glowing lava to the total cubic kilometers each has produced since it last erupted.
code:

sx1 = RX1 - sw - 60

for i in range(min(n, 2)):

    d.rounded_rectangle([sx, stop, sx + sw, sbot], radius=26, outline=rgba(TEXT, 150), width=5)

    text(labels[i], sx, sbot + 16, size=30)

concept: A volcano's fountain grows taller year by year, its plume height literally the eruption rate.
code:
axis_y = RBOT - 120
d.line([RX0 + 20, axis_y, RX1 - 20, axis_y], fill=rgba(TEXT, 160), width=4)
maxv = vmax if vmax > 0 else 1.0
volc = (images.get(labels[-1]) if n else None) or subject_image("volcano")
paste(volc, RX0 + 20, axis_y - 160, 210, 190)
step = (RX1 - RX0 - 320) / max(1, n - 1) if n > 1 else 0
for i in range(n):
    x = RX0 + 300 + step * i
    seg_reveal = clamp(reveal * n - i, 0, 1)
    hgt = (RBOT - RTOP - 280) * (values[i] / maxv) * seg_reveal
    for k in range(int(hgt // 14)):
        yy = axis_y - k * 14
        wob = 8 * math.sin(reveal * 8 + k + i)
        d.ellipse([x - 16 + wob, yy - 16, x + 16 + wob, yy + 16], fill=rgba(WARN, 200))
    text(labels[i], x - 40, axis_y + 20, size=28)
    text(f"{values[i]:.0f} m3/s", x - 60, axis_y - hgt - 50, size=40, color=HIGHLIGHT)

concept: Two islands emerge from the ocean; their lava-crust cover creeps up the shoreline exactly as far as the percent of surface it actually coats.
code:
maxv = 100.0
sea_top = RTOP + 480
d.rectangle([RX0, sea_top, RX1, RBOT], fill=rgba("#0b3654", 220))
for k in range(8):
    yy = sea_top + k * ((RBOT - sea_top) / 8)
    d.line([RX0, yy, RX1, yy], fill=rgba(HIGHLIGHT, 60), width=2)
half = (RX1 - RX0) // 2
for i in range(min(n, 2)):
    ix0 = RX0 + i * half
    ix1 = ix0 + half - 20
    isl = images.get(labels[i]) or subject_image("volcanic island")
    paste(isl, ix0, RTOP + 60, ix1 - ix0, 420)
    frac = clamp(values[i] / maxv, 0, 1) * reveal
    crust_h = int((RBOT - sea_top) * 0.6 * frac)
    d.rounded_rectangle([ix0 + 10, RBOT - crust_h - 20, ix1 - 10, RBOT - 20], radius=20, fill=rgba(WARN, 200))
    text(labels[i], ix0 + 10, RTOP + 20, size=30)
    text(f"{values[i]:.0f}% lava-covered", ix0 + 10, RBOT - crust_h - 66, size=28, color=HIGHLIGHT)

concept: Trees bend in the wind, with their leaves filling in to represent the wind speed and their labels and values displayed next to them
code:
tree_img = subject_image("tree with leaves") or images.get(labels[0])

tree2_img = subject_image("tree with leaves") or (images.get(labels[1]) if n > 1 else None)

midx = (RX0 + RX1) // 2

maxv = vmax if vmax > 0 else 1.0

tree1_x = RX0 + 20

tree2_x = RX1 - 200

tree_y = RTOP + 60

tree_h = 420

tree_w = 120

d.rectangle([tree1_x, tree_y, tree1_x + tree_w, tree_y + tree_h], fill=rgba("#786c3b", 200))

d.rectangle([tree2_x, tree_y, tree2_x + tree_w, tree_y + tree_h], fill=rgba("#786c3b", 200))

frac1 = clamp(values[0] / maxv, 0, 1) * reveal

frac2 = clamp(values[1] / maxv, 0, 1) * reveal if n > 1 else 0

fill_image(tree_img, frac1, tree1_x + 10, tree_y + 10, tree_w - 20, tree_h - 20, direction='up')

if n > 1:

    fill_image(tree2_img, frac2, tree2_x + 10, tree_y + 10, tree_w - 20, tree_h - 20, direction='up')

text(labels[0], tree1_x, tree_y - 30, size=30)

text(f"{values[0]:.0f} mph", tree1_x, tree_y + tree_h + 20, size=38, color=HIGHLIGHT)

if n > 1:

    text(labels[1], tree2_x, tree_y - 30, size=30)

    text(f"{values[1]:.0f} mph", tree2_x, tree_y + tree_h + 20, size=38, color=HIGHLIGHT)

    d.line([midx, RTOP, midx, RBOT], fill=rgba(HIGHLIGHT, 200), width=3)

    text("comparing wind speeds", midx - 150, RTOP + 20, size=30, color=TEXT)

concept: Giant windmills with spinning blades, each blade's length and sweep area corresponding to a year's wind speed record, are revealed as the animation progresses.
code:
maxv = vmax if vmax > 0 else 1.0
midx = (RX0 + RX1) // 2
mill_gap = 120
mill_count = min(n, 2)
mill_width = (RX1 - RX0 - (mill_count - 1) * mill_gap) // mill_count
mill_height = RBOT - RTOP - 140
for i in range(mill_count):
    mill_x = RX0 + i * (mill_width + mill_gap)
    mill_y = RTOP + 20
    mill_img = images.get(labels[i]) or subject_image("windmill base")
    paste(mill_img, mill_x, mill_y, mill_width, 100)
    frac = clamp(values[i] / maxv, 0, 1) * reveal
    blade_len = int(mill_height * frac)
    blade_angle = math.pi * 2 * frac
    blade_x = mill_x + mill_width // 2
    blade_y = mill_y + 100
    d.line([blade_x, blade_y, blade_x + math.sin(blade_angle) * blade_len, blade_y - math.cos(blade_angle) * blade_len], fill=rgba(ACCENT, 200), width=8)
    d.ellipse([blade_x - 20, blade_y - 20, blade_x + 20, blade_y + 20], fill=rgba(HIGHLIGHT, 150))
    text(labels[i], mill_x + 10, mill_y - 30, size=30)
    text(f"{values[i]:.0f} mph", mill_x + 10, mill_y + 120, size=48, color=HIGHLIGHT)

concept: A swirling tornado forms from warm air and moisture, with the funnel cloud length and debris cloud size representing the data values
code:
img_warm = subject_image('warm air') or subject_image('sun')
img_moist = subject_image('moisture') or subject_image('water droplet')
x0 = RX0 + 100
y0 = RTOP + 200
x1 = RX1 - 100
y1 = RBOT - 200
maxv = vmax if vmax > 0 else 1.0
warm_frac = clamp(values[0] / maxv, 0, 1) * reveal
moist_frac = clamp(values[1] / maxv, 0, 1) * reveal
funnel_h = int((y1 - y0) * warm_frac)
d.ellipse([x0 + 20, y1 - funnel_h, x0 + 60, y1], fill=rgba(ACCENT, 200))
paste(img_warm, x0 + 25, y1 - funnel_h + 10, 30, 30)
text(labels[0], x0 + 10, y1 - funnel_h - 20, size=30)
text(f"{values[0]:.1f}°C", x0 + 10, y1 - funnel_h - 50, size=28, color=HIGHLIGHT)
d.ellipse([x1 - 60, y1 - 20, x1 - 20, y1 + 20], fill=rgba(ACCENT, 200))
paste(img_moist, x1 - 55, y1 - 10, 30, 30)
text(labels[1], x1 - 60, y1 + 30, size=30)
text(f"{values[1]:.0f}%", x1 - 60, y1 + 60, size=28, color=HIGHLIGHT)
debris_radius = int(50 * moist_frac)
d.ellipse([x1 - debris_radius, y1 - debris_radius, x1 + debris_radius, y1 + debris_radius], outline=rgba(HIGHLIGHT, 150), width=4)
